sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, event_time DateTime64(3), description String);
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (1, toDateTime('2024-01-01 00:00:00.000'), 'New Year Event'), (2, toDateTime('2024-01-01 00:00:01.000'), 'First Second');
SELECT id, subtractNanoseconds(event_time, 1000000) AS adjusted_time FROM test_dates WHERE description ILIKE '%event%';
SELECT id, event_time, subtractNanoseconds(event_time, 500000) AS earlier_time FROM test_dates WHERE earlier_time ILIKE '2024-01-01%';
SELECT id, event_time, subtractNanoseconds(event_time, toUInt64(1000)) AS nanoseconds_adjusted FROM test_dates WHERE description ILIKE 'first%';
SELECT id, subtractNanoseconds(event_time, 1000000) AS adjusted_time FROM (SELECT id, event_time, description FROM test_dates) AS subquery WHERE adjusted_time ILIKE '2024-01-01%';
WITH (SELECT MAX(subtractNanoseconds(event_time, 2000)) FROM test_dates) AS max_adjusted_time SELECT description FROM test_dates WHERE event_time ILIKE max_adjusted_time;
CREATE TABLE temp_dates AS SELECT id, subtractNanoseconds(event_time, -1000000) AS neg_adjusted_time FROM test_dates;
SELECT id, subtractNanoseconds(event_time, toFloat64(999.999)) AS precise_time FROM test_dates ORDER BY precise_time ILIKE '2024%';
SELECT description, COUNT(*) FROM test_dates GROUP BY description HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 AND description ILIKE 'Event';
